title: MicroBreaks: Desk Recovery
subtitle: 2-minute resets for eyes, neck, posture & focus
keywords: eye strain,neck pain,posture,desk stretch,focus break,screen break,work break,recovery,exercises
description:
MicroBreaks is built for desk workers who feel eye strain, tight shoulders, posture fatigue, and focus drops during the workday.

Instead of acting like a generic wellness app, MicroBreaks helps you interrupt strain with short guided resets that fit between meetings, focus blocks, and long screen sessions.

--- DESK RECOVERY, NOT JUST A TIMER ---
Start from what you need right now: eye relief, neck and shoulder reset, posture recovery, focus reset, energy lift, or a calmer breathing break.

--- 38 GUIDED RESETS + 118 ANIMATED MOVES ---
The library includes 38 guided sessions across quick, stretch, mindful, and active categories — plus an animated movement library of 118 desk-friendly exercises. Every move has a looping demo animation, a muscle map, a difficulty level, and step-by-step instructions, and converts into a short guided session with voice coaching.

--- BUILT AROUND REAL WORKDAY PAIN ---
Use MicroBreaks when your eyes feel dry, your shoulders lock up, your posture collapses, or your attention starts to slip. Browse by body zone (neck, back, chest, arms, core, legs, cardio) and by the space you have: at your desk, standing, or on the floor.

--- SEE YOUR RECOVERY STORY ---
Track your weekly rhythm, recovery mix, and best reset windows. The stats experience is designed to show whether your routine is actually helping or if strain is still building up across the week.

--- ALSO INCLUDES ---
• Animated movement library with body-zone browsing and space filters (at desk / standing / floor)
• Focus timer presets and custom work/break rhythms
• Guided resets for eyes, neck, posture, focus, breathing, and movement
• Notification reminders for building a steadier reset rhythm
• Private-by-default core experience with optional sync as supported
• Anonymous diagnostics for app stability
• English and Turkish support

Start with the core recovery experience and build a healthier work rhythm over time.
promotional_text: New: Animated movement library — 118 desk-friendly exercises with guided sessions.
